description:
![Cover](https://i.ibb.co/jfPscJ3/title-bg-en.png)

After waiting for some months, Frontwing finally released the Free DRM version of this game by Milk Factory. The main differences this version has with the Steam one is the inclusion of the retail installer, but translated to english and simplfied chinese and the game being uncensored right out of the box.

For the record, in case you think that this torrent (might) be fake due to its size, I recommend you going to back school, and this time make sure to not skip the math classes.
If you're still unsure, go ahead and report the torrent, it's already on GGN and no one has mentioned having a virus (I wonder why).

![getting caught by a genius](https://i.ibb.co/xftxRZw/librewolf-c-Yh07-MCYGn.jpg)

Contact me: https://discord.gg/fjZKJJUWw4

**UPDATE:** I've decided to include as a download link the game unpacked using GarBro, but as per usual with Milk Factory games, the executable has to be thrown away since they modify it (probably with an internal tool) to make it not accept an uncompressed folder. This new executable file is simply taken from KiriKiri Z's 1.2.0.3 source code and added everything that differs from the original executable with Resource Hacker (and the file size is still smaller for some reason): https://pixeldrain.com/u/QojgHaAn (if the link dies, you can contact me by finding me on some Taimanin Discord servers)
